summary: Backend smoke test of Jijamata ITI API: all 14 endpoint scenarios executed against public URL. All passed. Email is correctly MOCKED (logged only).
passed: POST /api/applications with empty fullName -> 400 'Missing required fields'
GET /api/admin/applications with Bearer token -> 200, includes created applicationId
GET /api/admin/stats -> 200 with total, byStatus(4 statuses), byCourse(all 8 trades)
GET /api/admin/applications/csv with token -> 200 text/csv with Content-Disposition attachment and header+row
action_items: Optional/minor: spec said missing-field returns 400; FastAPI returns 422 by default. Acceptable, but if strict 400 is required, add a custom RequestValidationError handler.
mocked_apis_observed: Email sending (smtplib) — confirmed mocked; backend log line '[EMAIL MOCKED]'
